data.description:
Repro (verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD): archive T; then
- reopen T -> exit 10 with hint 'Re-run: ticket transition <id> archived open'
- transition T archived open -> exit 1: invalid current_status 'archived'. Must be one of: open, in_progress, closed, blocked
- transition T open (auto-detect) -> exit 1 (auto-detect feeds 'archived' into the same validator)
- claim T -> exit 10. No unarchive anywhere (grep -rni unarchive src/ -> nothing).

Source: ticket_txn.py:76 builds the re-run hint from actual_status verbatim even when it is not a legal current_status; ticket-transition.sh:121-146 _validate_status whitelist is open|in_progress|closed|blocked.

Fix direction: add an unarchive path (clear .archived marker / write event) and make the txn hint say so when actual_status == archived; or accept archived as current_status for archived->open.

RED test: archive then reopen/transition must either succeed or emit a hint that, when executed verbatim, succeeds.
data.title: archived is an inescapable status; the engine's own recovery hint is a command that always fails
